# Diabeticks

> Your personal diabetes management companion — track medicines, blood sugar readings, prescriptions, food, and fitness in one playful app.

Diabeticks helps people living with diabetes stay on top of daily routines through medicine adherence tracking, blood sugar logging, prescription management, meal planning, and fitness goals.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page introducing Diabeticks and its features.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is collected, stored, and protected.
- [Terms of Use](/terms): Terms and conditions for using Diabeticks.
